questions.text: In groups, I hope to be the center of everyone's attention.
When I am with my friends, I will take the initiative to liven up the atmosphere most of the time.
In a strange environment, I will not observe for a period of time before deciding whether to take the initiative to socialize, but try to integrate as soon as possible.
I enjoy in-depth communication with a few close friends, but not more than large-scale parties.
As someone invites me to participate in an event, I usually accept it willingly.
In team projects, I tend to discuss with everyone rather than complete it alone, even if it may be delayed by friends.
It's not too difficult for me to talk to someone I meet for the first time.
I'm not afraid of people who are too outgoing
I think I am a good child
When I see strangers sad, I have a strong urge to comfort them.
If my friend sincerely apologizes, I am willing to forgive twice as much as not.
Sometimes in order to maintain harmony, I will choose to compromise, even if it is unfair to me.
I believe most people are kind.
When my classmates encounter difficulties, I am willing to provide help as much as I can.
I hate conflicts and will find ways to avoid quarrels.
Even if I disagree with others, I will try to respect and understand.
I will make a study or life plan for myself and try to abide by it.
I will insist on liking the things I love or idols, even if I encounter opposition or discrimination from others
I am careful and will check repeatedly to avoid mistakes.
I have a high standard for what I care about, which will irritate my failure.
Without external supervision, I can also complete the task consciously.
Once I start a task, I usually stick to it.
Even if I am unlucky, I will keep trying and think that I or others are responsible.
I will take my responsibilities seriously, whether it is study or clubs.
Before facing important exams or activities, I will feel so nervous that it affects my life.
If something is not done well, I may be upset for more than half a year.
Sometimes I worry about possible difficulties or natural disasters in the future.
My mood will fluctuate with the quality of things around me, and my self-regulation ability is poor.
I like to give effective advice to my peers, even if it may be seen as put pressure on others.
After making a choice, I often think about 'what would happen if I chose another one'.
I am very sensitive to other people's evaluations and will care about them for a long time.
When relaxing, I can't concentrate on doing something for more than an hour.
I'm always curious about new things.
I like art forms such as music, painting or literature.
I occasionally come up with some novel ideas or ideas.
I'm willing to try food I've never eaten or sports I've never played.
I like to think about some abstract or philosophical problems.
I have a preference for certain things, but not narrow-minded, such as all lovely things
Even if I don't agree with others, I'm willing to listen.

ichika.name: Hoshino Ichika
ichika.desc:
Hoshino Ichika is one of the iconic characters of Project Sekai. Her representative color is a fresh blue-purple, like the intersection of sky and sea, symbolizing the gentleness and resilience deep within her heart. As a second-year high school student at Miyamasuzaka Girls' Academy, Ichika serves as the lead vocalist and guitarist for Leo/need.

Those who meet Ichika for the first time are often captivated by her cool exterior. With her long black hair and a perpetually somewhat aloof expression, she gives off an air of inaccessibility. However, beneath this seemingly indifferent shell lies an incredibly gentle and kind heart. As described in the game, she "may look cool, but is actually a very gentle girl toward her friends." This gap between her appearance and personality is one of her most endearing traits.

Ichika's personality embodies typical ISFP traits—introverted, sensitive, gentle, and artistic. She is not good at expressing her emotions, especially when dealing with childhood friends she has grown distant from, often appearing somewhat clumsy. Yet, it is precisely this clumsiness that makes her sincerity shine through. She silently cares for those around her, remembers everyone's preferences, and offers the warmest support during critical moments.

During the process of reuniting the band, Ichika demonstrated immense tolerance and a strong sense of responsibility. Faced with Shiho's indifference and Honami's hesitation, she never gave up and worked hard in her own way to bridge the gap between them. Her persistence stems from a deep-seated value for friendship, and even in the most difficult times, she never forgot the happy moments the four of them once shared.

Ichika also has a lesser-known side—she is a devoted Hatsune Miku fan. Her room is covered in Hatsune Miku posters, her phone is filled with Hatsune Miku songs, and she even secretly writes lyrics during class. This love for the virtual singer became the catalyst for her encounter with Hatsune Miku and laid the foundation for the unfolding of the entire story.

It is worth mentioning that Ichika's name carries her parents' best wishes. The name "Ichika" not only commemorates the song that brought her parents together but also embodies their hope that she "would meet irreplaceable people through singing." And indeed, through music, she rekindled precious friendships and fulfilled her parents' expectations.

saki.name: Tenma Saki
saki.desc:
Tenma Saki's representative color is a bright, golden yellow, as warm and radiant as sunshine, perfectly embodying her role as the group's "mood maker." As a second-year student at Miyamasuzaka Girls' Academy, Saki is the keyboardist for Leo/need.

Saki is a natural optimist, always wearing a brilliant smile no matter the time or place. With her outgoing and cheerful personality, she is full of energy and has a gift for lifting the spirits of everyone around her. Within the band, she is not just the keyboardist but also its emotional anchor; whenever the others face a challenge, she encourages them to keep moving forward with her positive outlook.

However, Saki's path hasn't always been easy. She was sickly as a child and spent most of her middle school years in the hospital, at times unable to attend school at all. This battle with illness made her deeply appreciate a healthy life and intensified her desire to spend her precious youth with her friends. As she herself says, she wants to "enjoy her youth as much as possible because being in the hospital made her feel like she missed out on so much."

Despite enduring such pain, Saki never lost hope. On the contrary, these experiences made her stronger and more mature. She understands the preciousness of life, which is why she faces each day with such positivity, striving to bring happiness to herself and those around her. Her optimism isn't blind; it stems from a profound understanding and appreciation for life.

Saki also has a unique sense of fashion, with a particular love for gyaru and other subculture styles. She often watches fashion and makeup videos online and even makes her own beaded accessories. This pursuit of beauty isn't just about her appearance; it flows into her music as well. Her songs are always so full of color and vivid imagery that they make you want to get up and dance.

As the band's keyboardist, Saki's playing style is passionate, unrestrained, and incredibly infectious. Her music, much like her personality, brings warmth and strength to all who hear it. During the process of reuniting the band, she was the most enthusiastic driving force; it was her persistence and passion that ultimately brought Ichika, Shiho, and Honami back together.

honami.name: Mochizuki Honami
honami.desc:
Mochizuki Honami's representative color is a vivid orange-red, a hue that lies between passion and gentleness, aptly reflecting her complex and conflicted inner world. As a second-year student at Miyamasuzaka Girls' Academy, Honami serves as the drummer for Leo/need.

Honami's personality has undergone a clear journey of growth. In her early days, she was introverted, shy, and lacked self-confidence, always carefully gauging the reactions of those around her. She exhibited strong people-pleasing tendencies, greeting everyone with a smile and fearing displeasing anyone. This personality stemmed from a painful experience during her middle school years, where she was ostracized and mocked by classmates for being "too nice to everyone."

That experience in middle school left deep emotional scars on Honami. She grew afraid of interacting with people, constantly worrying that her good intentions would be misunderstood. When Ichika repeatedly tried to reconcile with her, she often chose to run away, terrified of experiencing the pain of being hurt again. Her heart was full of contradiction: she longed to reunite with her friends but was also afraid of getting hurt once more.

However, as the band's activities progressed, Honami gradually revealed her gentle and strong side. She began to learn to express her true feelings, no longer simply trying to please others. This change was not only reflected in her personality but also in her musical performance. Her drumming, once hesitant, grew increasingly firm and powerful, as if narrating her inner growth.

Honami is also an all-around excellent student, excelling both academically and physically. Her grades are outstanding, she holds important positions in her class, and she possesses immense talent in music. Her drumming skills are superb; she can accurately grasp the rhythm and emotion of each song, adding a unique charm to the band's overall performance.

During the process of reuniting the band, Honami's inner struggle was the most intense. She wanted to return to the warm embrace of the group of four but was equally afraid of being hurt again. In the end, thanks to Ichika's persistence and Shiho's infectious optimism, she finally mustered the courage to confront her own feelings and rekindle the friendship she had lost. Though this process was painful, it ultimately made her stronger and more mature.

shiho.name: Hinomori Shiho
shiho.desc:
Hinomori Shiho's representative color is a fresh yellow-green, a shade close to nature, symbolizing the purity deep within her heart and her pursuit of authenticity. As a second-year student at Miyamasuzaka Girls' Academy, Shiho serves as the bassist for Leo/need.

Shiho is a classic example of someone who is cold on the outside but warm on the inside. She usually wears an expression that says "keep your distance," giving off an aura of inaccessibility. She isn't good at expressing her emotions and always uses her cold exterior to protect herself. However, hidden beneath this icy shell is an incredibly gentle and kind heart. As described in the game, "although she usually acts like a lone wolf who keeps others at arm's length, she treasures this hard-won friendship more than anyone."

The formation of Shiho's personality is closely linked to her upbringing. During middle school, she was ostracized by her classmates for being introverted and not good at socializing. To avoid causing trouble for Ichika, she chose to distance herself. This experience made her close herself off even more and instilled in her a deep distrust of interpersonal relationships.

Yet, Shiho has her own principles and convictions. She won't change herself to please others, nor will she force herself to fit into circles that aren't right for her just because she's afraid of being lonely. She would rather be alone than hypocritically cater to others. Although this stubbornness makes her seem somewhat aloof, it also allows her to maintain her inner purity and authenticity.

When it comes to music, Shiho demonstrates exceptional talent and dedication. Her bass playing skills are proficient; she can accurately grasp the bass line of each song, laying a solid foundation for the band's overall performance. She has her own unique understanding of music and consistently offers constructive suggestions that push the band to keep improving.

Shiho also has a lesser-known side—she is a devoted cat lover. She likes cats so much that it borders on obsession. She feeds stray cats on her way to school, secretly keeps a cat at home, and even gets distracted worrying about the safety of cats. This love for small animals reveals the gentleness and kindness deep within her.

During the process of reuniting the band, Shiho was the last member to rejoin. She set a strict condition for Ichika and Saki: she would only join the band if they could perfectly perform a piece she specified. This demand seemed harsh, but it was actually her way of testing both their musical commitment and their friendship. When she saw Ichika and Saki practicing diligently to meet her standards, the defenses around her heart were finally broken down, and she returned to the embrace of the group of four.

minori.name: Hanasato Minori
minori.desc:
Hanasato Minori's representative color is a warm pinkish-orange, a sweet and vibrant hue that perfectly captures her charm and passion as an idol. As a first-year student at Miyamasuzaka Girls' Academy, Minori is the leader and lead vocalist of MORE MORE JUMP!

Minori is a quintessential energetic girl, blessed with an optimistic and cheerful personality and driven by an unstoppable spirit. The word "give up" seems absent from her vocabulary; no matter the difficulty, she always faces it head-on. Her dream of becoming an idol stems from a deep-seated love for the stage, and even after countless failed auditions, her determination never wavered. As she puts it, "The moment I step onto the stage, I feel like I'm shining all over!"

However, Minori also has her little flaws—she can be a bit clumsy and prone to panic. In stressful situations, she might forget the lyrics, mess up a dance step, or even trip on stage. But these small mistakes actually make her seem more genuine and endearing, and her fans find her all the more approachable because of them.

Minori's path to becoming an idol has been filled with challenges. She's incredibly unlucky, which has made her cherish the opportunities she has now even more and taught her the importance of teamwork. She deeply understands that individual strength is limited; only by working together can they go further on their idol journey.

Within MORE MORE JUMP!, Minori is not only the leader but also the group's emotional guide. She consistently uplifts everyone with her positive attitude and ignites their dreams with her passion. She encourages her teammates when they're feeling down, comes up with solutions when the group faces problems, and pumps everyone up before a performance. Her presence is what gives the whole team its strong sense of unity.

Minori also has a unique fashion sense, with a particular love for cute clothes and accessories. Her closet is packed with brightly colored, adorably designed outfits, and her room is filled with plush toys and character goods. This love for all things cute isn't just part of her daily life; it's also woven into her idol performances, becoming a signature element of her style.

haruka.name: Kiritani Haruka
haruka.desc:
Kirigaya Haruka's representative color is a serene, light blue. This clear, water-like hue complements her introverted and calm personality perfectly. As a second-year student at Miyamasuzaka Girls' Academy, Haruka is the dance specialist for MORE MORE JUMP!

Haruka was once a popular idol, frequently appearing on television variety shows and commanding a large fanbase. However, at the peak of her career, she suddenly announced her retirement from the entertainment industry to return to school and focus on her studies. This decision surprised everyone, from her fans to her agency. But Haruka had her reasons—she felt she had lost sight of herself while chasing her idol dream and wanted to rediscover her true self.

Haruka has a rational and composed personality, always able to maintain a clear head in critical moments. She isn't good at expressing her emotions and often uses her calm exterior to mask her inner feelings. But this doesn't mean she's cold; on the contrary, she cares deeply for those around her—she's simply not adept at putting it into words.

Within MORE MORE JUMP!, Haruka is the team's technical expert. With her solid dance foundation and outstanding choreography skills, she consistently creates routines for the group that are both beautiful and technically challenging. She holds herself to an incredibly high standard, constantly refining every single movement in pursuit of perfection. Her commitment to continuous improvement drives the whole team forward.

Haruka also possesses a unique perceptiveness. She can keenly sense changes in her teammates' emotions and is always ready to offer a helping hand when someone is in need. Although she is a woman of few words, when she does speak, her words carry weight and always hit the mark. She is the most reliable presence on the team, like a lighthouse in the sea, guiding the way for everyone.

It's also worth mentioning that Haruka is an avid bookworm. Her room is piled high with books on a vast range of subjects, from literary classics to business management, from psychology to sociology. This extensive reading not only enriches her inner world but also provides her with a wealth of inspiration and ideas for her idol activities.

airi.name: Momoi Airi
airi.desc:
Momoi Airi's representative color is a passionate pink, a vibrant hue that perfectly embodies her professionalism as a former idol and her deep love for the idol industry. As a third-year student at Miyamasuzaka Girls' Academy, Airi takes on the role of producer for MORE MORE JUMP!

She possesses a strong passion and pride for the idol world, and even after leaving the entertainment industry, she continues to follow its trends closely. Her personality is confident and resolute, marked by a powerful sense of responsibility and mission.

Airi has exceptional organizational and planning skills. She handles everything from the team's schedule and performance planning to costumes and props—all the various tasks, big and small. She is the key person ensuring the team runs smoothly. Her work efficiency is remarkably high; she can complete complex tasks in a short amount of time, and the quality is always reliable. Her presence keeps the entire group's operations orderly and well-managed.

Airi's personality displays classic ENTJ traits—she is outgoing, decisive, and a natural leader. She can always find order in chaos and solutions in the face of difficulty. Her decisions are consistently rational and resolute, never swayed by emotion. When disagreements arise within the team, she can calmly analyze the problem and offer reasonable suggestions to help everyone reach a consensus.

However, Airi also has a side that few people see. She was once forced to retire from the idol world for certain reasons, an experience that left her with deep regrets. Yet, she didn't give up on her love for idol activities. Instead, she channeled that passion into supporting and helping MORE MORE JUMP! She hopes that through her efforts, she can help Minori and the others achieve the dreams she herself was unable to fulfill.

Airi is also an excellent cook. She often prepares a wide variety of delicious food for her team members, from breakfast to late-night snacks, from main courses to desserts—everything she makes is a feast for the eyes and the taste buds. Her cooking isn't just tasty; it's also full of heartfelt intention, always making everyone feel the warmth of home.

shizuku.name: Hinomori Shizuku
shizuku.desc:
Hinomori Shizuku's representative color is a fresh blue-green, a shade close to nature that perfectly complements her elegant and reserved temperament. As a first-year student at Miyamasuzaka Girls' Academy, Shizuku is one of the lead vocalists for MORE MORE JUMP!

Shizuku is a quintessential young lady from a wealthy family, having received an excellent education since childhood. Her manners are elegant, her speech is refined, and she always carries herself with an air of nobility. Her academic performance is outstanding; her English, in particular, has reached a level where she could work as a tutor. She also plays the piano at a performance-grade level.

However, Shizuku's inner world is far more complex than her outward appearance suggests. She exhibits classic INFJ personality traits—she is introverted, idealistic, and highly perceptive. She is a keen observer, able to sensitively detect the emotional changes of those around her, yet she rarely expresses her own thoughts and feelings. She is always thinking, always observing, always searching for meaning and value in life.

Shizuku has a unique understanding of what it means to be an idol. She believes that idols are not just performers on a stage, but beings who can bring hope and courage to people. She hopes that through her singing, she can touch the softest, most vulnerable places in people's hearts, bringing them strength and comfort. It is this philosophy that makes her voice so incredibly moving.

Within MORE MORE JUMP!, Shizuku is a mysterious yet vital presence. She speaks little, but when she does, her words carry significant weight. She always silently supports the team, playing a crucial role in key moments. Her singing voice is clear and pure, like a heavenly sound, adding a unique charm to the group's performances.

It's also worth mentioning that Shizuku is a skilled archer. She has practiced archery since she was young and has reached a remarkably high level of proficiency. Archery has taught her focus and patience, and has also cultivated her character and grace. This love for traditional culture is also reflected in her idol performances, infusing her stage presence with a timeless, classical beauty.

kohane.name: Azusawa Kohane
kohane.desc:
Azusawa Kohane's representative color is a warm pink, a soft hue that creates an interesting contrast with her introverted and timid personality. As a student at Miyamasuzaka Girls' Academy, Kohane is the lead vocalist for Vivid BAD SQUAD.

Kohane is an extremely introverted and timid girl who approaches everything with nervousness and hesitation. She is very shy, lacks self-confidence, and is always afraid to express herself in front of others. Her voice is soft, and she often stumbles over her words, feeling tense even around people she knows well. This personality trait often leaves her in a passive state in daily life, finding it difficult to actively express her thoughts and feelings.

However, Kohane possesses a hidden musical talent. Her singing voice is clear, pure, and incredibly moving. Whenever she sings, she radiates a special kind of light, as if she becomes a different person. Her voice can touch people's hearts, allowing them to feel the deep emotions within her. This stark contrast surprises everyone who knows her—the same girl who can barely speak clearly in everyday conversation can sing such soul-stirring songs.

Kohane's journey to joining Vivid BAD SQUAD was filled with dramatic moments. She was originally just an ordinary high school student, living a quiet, everyday life. That is, until one day when she heard Koh's singing in an alley and was deeply captivated by that free-spirited, unrestrained musical style. Encouraged by Koh's invitation, she mustered the courage to join this street music group, beginning her musical journey.

Throughout her growth, Kohane gradually learned to face her fears and overcome her challenges. She began to find the courage to sing in public, to express her own ideas, and to pursue her dreams. Although this process was filled with difficulties and obstacles, she never gave up. Her efforts paid off, not only in her musical progress but also in her personal growth, becoming stronger and more confident in character.

Kohane also possesses a kind and sensitive heart. She can always sense the emotional changes in those around her and is quick to lend a helping hand when her teammates need support. Though she may not be skilled with words, her actions are always full of care and warmth. She is the "healing presence" within the team, consistently bringing comfort and strength to everyone.

an.name: Shiraishi An
an.desc:
Shiraishi An's representative color is a fresh sky blue, a bright and composed hue that perfectly captures her straightforward and decisive personality. As a third-year middle school student at Aoba City Municipal Higashi Middle School, An is one of the lead vocalists for Vivid BAD SQUAD.

An is a girl with a frank personality, proactive and decisive in everything she does. She has a strong competitive spirit and never admits defeat. With a somewhat boyish disposition, she speaks and acts without beating around the bush, always expressing her thoughts and feelings directly. She is highly action-oriented—once she decides to do something, she does it immediately, without any hesitation.

However, An's heart is far gentler and more delicate than her exterior suggests. She is actually very considerate of others' feelings and always ready to offer support and help when someone is in need. Her directness isn't without tact; it's built on a foundation of understanding and caring for others. She won't hesitate to point out someone's mistakes, but she'll also offer sincere advice and encouragement alongside it.

An has a strong passion and dedication to music. She has loved singing since she was a child, dreaming of one day becoming a true artist. Her musical style is free-spirited and unrestrained, imbued with a streetwise energy. Her voice is powerful and capable of igniting the passion of her audience. She believes that music is the best way to express oneself, and through it, she can convey her beliefs and emotions.

An played a crucial role in the formation of Vivid BAD SQUAD. It was she who took the initiative to invite Kohane to join the group, who actively sought out suitable teammates, and who drove the development of the entire unit. Her leadership and organizational skills helped Vivid BAD SQUAD grow from a loose collection of individuals into a cohesive team.

An also has a unique sense of fashion, with a particular love for street culture and hip-hop style clothing. Her outfits are always full of personality, with every detail from her hat to her shoes carefully coordinated. This pursuit of style is also reflected in her musical taste, contributing to her unique personal charm.

It's also worth mentioning that An works part-time as a barista. She works at a cafe called "Crase Cafe," which later becomes the home base for Vivid BAD SQUAD's activities. Her latte art skills are top-notch; she can always create all kinds of adorable patterns, delighting the customers.

akito.name: Shinonome Akito
akito.desc:
Shinonome Akito's representative color is a warm orange-yellow, a vibrant hue that perfectly matches his sunny and cheerful personality. As a third-year middle school student at Aoba City Municipal Higashi Middle School, Akito is the DJ and producer for Vivid BAD SQUAD.

Akito is an outgoing and lively boy, always brimming with energy and enthusiasm. He has strong social skills and can quickly connect with strangers. With a great sense of humor, he always knows how to lighten the mood with jokes and funny stories. Within the team, he serves as the "designated mood-maker," consistently helping everyone forget their worries and simply enjoy the joy that music brings.

Akito possesses immense natural talent and passion for music. He has been interested in music since childhood, with a particular love for electronic and hip-hop genres. His DJ skills are exceptional; he can proficiently operate various equipment to create unique musical effects. He also produces his own music, handling everything from composition to arrangement independently. His musical style is innovative and experimental, always managing to surprise his listeners.

In Vivid BAD SQUAD, Akito is not only the DJ but also the group's music producer. He is responsible for producing and mixing most of the team's songs, infusing each track with a distinct style and soul. His creativity and imagination ensure that Vivid BAD SQUAD's music always feels fresh and original.

Akito also has a lesser-known side—he is an avid gamer. His room is filled with various gaming setups, from consoles to handheld devices, from controllers to keyboard and mouse setups—you name it. He is particularly fond of rhythm games, which have also honed his keen sense of musical timing. He often draws inspiration from game music and incorporates it into his own productions.

It's also worth mentioning that Akito has an older sister—Shinonome Enanan. Although their personalities are quite different, they share a very close bond. Akito is always there to support his sister when she needs help, while Ena provides inspiration and advice for her brother's music creation. This relationship adds a touch of genuine humanity to both of their characters.

touya.name: Aoyagi Toya
touya.desc:
Aoyagi Toya's representative color is a deep, midnight blue. This mysterious and composed hue perfectly complements his quiet demeanor and richly detailed inner world. As a third-year middle school student at Aoba City Municipal Higashi Middle School, Toya serves as the MC and rapper for Vivid BAD SQUAD.

Toya is a boy of few words but possesses a strong will. He doesn't talk much, often preferring to quietly observe and contemplate. His expression is usually serious, which can make him seem somewhat unapproachable. However, those who know him well understand that his inner world is incredibly rich, shaped by his own unique values and outlook on life.

Toya's personality has been deeply influenced by his upbringing. His complex family background taught him independence and resilience from a young age. While he struggles to express his emotions verbally, his actions consistently demonstrate a strong sense of responsibility and commitment. Within the team, he is the most reliable presence, always stepping up to play a crucial role when it matters most.

Toya's rap skills are profound, and his lyrics are filled with philosophical depth. He dislikes empty, meaningless words and always infuses his raps with his own thoughts and insights. His rap style is unique, blending the raw edge of the streets with the sensitivity of a poet, creating a distinctive personal charm. Each of his pieces feels like a poem, resonating deeply with listeners and prompting them to reflect.

In Vivid BAD SQUAD, Toya is a mysterious yet vital figure. Although he speaks little, when he does, his words carry significant weight. He is the team's "brain trust," always ready to offer constructive ideas when everyone is facing a challenge. His calm and rational nature provides a stable anchor for the group.

Toya also has a special hobby—he loves stargazing. When night falls, he often goes up to the rooftop to gaze at the stars and ponder the meaning of life. This sense of awe for the universe and his contemplation of existence are also reflected in his music, imbuing his work with a philosophical quality.

It's also worth mentioning that Toya is skilled in martial arts. He has trained in martial arts since childhood and is proficient in various fighting techniques. This passion for martial arts has not only strengthened his body but also cultivated his willpower and focus. These qualities are also evident in his musical performances, giving his stage presence a powerful and compelling energy.

tsukasa.name: Tenma Tsukasa
tsukasa.desc:
Tenma Tsukasa's representative color is a bright, golden yellow, a hue as dazzling as the sun itself, perfectly embodying his ambition to become the "world's number one showstar." As a second-year student at Miyamasuzaka Girls' Academy, Tsukasa is the leader and lead actor of Wonderlands×Showtime.

Tsukasa is an extremely confident, even somewhat self-absorbed young man, whose dream is to become the "world's number one showstar." He is always bursting with energy and vitality, as if he has an endless well of enthusiasm. His personality is outgoing and cheerful; he loves performing in front of others and cherishes every moment on stage. His motto is: "Smiles are the most beautiful thing in the world!"

Tsukasa's confidence is not unfounded. He possesses immense performing talent, effortlessly mastering singing, dancing, and acting. His stage presence is incredibly powerful; he consistently ignites the audience's passion with his own energy, filling every performance with joy and surprise. He believes in the power of performance, convinced that it can bring happiness and courage to people.

However, Tsukasa's path hasn't always been easy. He has a younger sister, Tenma Saki, who has been frail and sickly since childhood, and he has always taken care of her. This experience made him stronger and more mature, and it also made him treasure the time spent with his sister even more. His dream of performing is, to a large extent, driven by a desire to make his sister happy and help her forget the pain of her illness.

Tsukasa played a central role in the formation of Wonderlands×Showtime. It was he who took the initiative to invite each member to join the troupe, who conceived their various brilliant performance plans, and who drove the entire group's development. His leadership and creativity allowed Wonderlands×Showtime to grow from a small theater group into an influential performance company.

Tsukasa also possesses a unique imagination and creativity. He is always coming up with novel and interesting performance ideas, offering unique insights on everything from stage design to plot development. His mind is full of whimsical thoughts, constantly bringing surprises to the team. He believes that "imagination is limitless"—as long as you dare to imagine, nothing is impossible.

It's also worth mentioning that Tsukasa has a secret identity: he works part-time as a performer at Phoenix Wonderland, an amusement park. This park later becomes the home base for Wonderlands×Showtime's activities and the stage where they pursue their dreams. His work experience at the park provided him with a wealth of performance experience and helped him better understand the audience's desires and preferences.

emu.name: Otori Emu
emu.desc:
Otori Emu's representative color is an adorable pink, a sweet and dreamy hue that perfectly captures her innocent, imaginative, and fantastical personality. As a first-year student at Miyamasuzaka Girls' Academy, Emu is one of the lead performers of Wonderlands×Showtime.

Emu is a cheerful and天真烂漫 girl, brimming with boundless imagination and curiosity. Her world is filled with fairy tales and magic, and she firmly believes that anything wonderful is possible. Her smile is as radiant as sunshine, capable of uplifting everyone around her. Her very existence feels like a miracle, bringing joy and happiness to those she meets.

Emu's background is quite special—she is the heiress to the Phoenix Wonderland amusement park. Her grandfather was the park's founder, and after his passing, she became its new owner. However, due to management difficulties, the park gradually fell into decline and faced the threat of closure. Emu is determined to use her own strength to save this place, so full of memories, and restore it to its former vibrancy.

Emu has a deep love and attachment to the amusement park. She grew up there, and every corner holds a memory for her. She remembers the stories behind each ride, the names of every employee, and the smiling faces of every visitor who came. She believes the amusement park is a "place where dreams come true," where everyone who visits can find their own happiness.

Within Wonderlands×Showtime, Emu is an indispensable core member. Her performance style is innocent and cute, filled with a fairy-tale quality. Her voice is like a heavenly bell, her dancing light and graceful, and her performances always manage to transport the audience to a world of magic. She is the "sprite" of the group, constantly bringing inspiration and joy to her teammates.

Emu also possesses an incredibly kind and pure heart. She can always see the good in others and is quick to offer trust and support. She believes in the "inherent goodness of people" and maintains an optimistic attitude even when facing difficulties or setbacks. This quality of hers not only inspires her team members but also touches every single audience member.

It's also worth mentioning that Emu has a special ability—she can "communicate" with the mascot dolls at the amusement park. She truly believes these dolls are alive, each with their own stories and dreams. This innocent conviction infuses her performances with a touch of magic and ensures that Wonderlands×Showtime's shows are always full of delightful surprises.

nene.name: Kusanagi Nene
nene.desc:
Kusanagi Nene's representative color is a fresh, light green, a vibrant hue that perfectly complements her gentle and kind personality. As a second-year student at Miyamasuzaka Girls' Academy, Nene serves as the prop master and stage manager for Wonderlands×Showtime.

Nene is an introverted and gentle girl, somewhat shy but incredibly kind-hearted. She isn't comfortable performing in public and prefers to work quietly behind the scenes. Her craftsmanship skills are exceptional; she can create all sorts of exquisite props and costumes. Her meticulous attention to detail and patience make her an indispensable presence within the team.

Nene has a unique understanding of performance. She believes that props and stage design are just as important as the acting itself—they are vital tools for creating atmosphere and conveying emotion. She always manages to design props and scenes that perfectly fit the needs of the story. Her creations are not only beautiful but also full of creativity, consistently providing visual surprises for the audience.

Within Wonderlands×Showtime, Nene is the unsung hero. Although she doesn't often appear on stage, her contributions are undeniable. From simple prop making to complex stage mechanisms, from costume design to lighting effects, she can handle it all on her own. Her work, while meticulous, involves carefully considered details that add countless brilliant touches to every performance.

Nene also possesses an incredibly sensitive and attentive heart. She always notices the small details that others might miss and is quick to offer help when the team needs it. She'll bring a teammate a cup of warm tea when they're nervous, quickly repair a damaged prop, or come up with a contingency plan when something goes wrong on stage. She is the team's "little angel," always bringing everyone a sense of warmth and reassurance.

It's also worth mentioning that Nene has a special hobby—she loves collecting all kinds of cute little trinkets. Her room is filled with various figurines, badges, keychains, and other small ornaments, each with its own story. She often incorporates these little treasures into her prop designs, giving each piece its own unique character.

rui.name: Kamishiro Rui
rui.desc:
Kamishiro Rui's representative color is a mysterious reddish-purple, a deep and distinctive hue that perfectly captures his eccentric and enigmatic personality. As a third-year student at Kamiyama High School, Rui serves as the inventor and stage designer for Wonderlands×Showtime.

Rui is an eccentric and mysterious young man, whose mind is always buzzing with all sorts of whimsical ideas. He possesses a unique worldview and set of values, always able to see things from a different perspective. His behavior can often be difficult to understand, but his creativity and imagination are truly awe-inspiring.

Rui is a genius inventor, capable of creating all kinds of marvelous devices and props. From simple mechanisms to complex robots, from stage special effects to vehicles, he can design and build them all. His inventions are always full of creativity and surprise, often leaving his teammates and the audience utterly astonished. He believes that "the fusion of technology and art can create miracles," and through his inventions, he can add endless possibilities to their performances.

However, Rui's inner world is far more complex and lonely than his exterior suggests. He isn't good at communicating with people and often immerses himself in his own world. His inventions are, to a large extent, an attempt to fill the void inside him, to prove his worth through creation. He longs to be understood and accepted, yet he doesn't know how to express his own feelings.

Within Wonderlands×Showtime, Rui is a mysterious yet vital presence. His inventions provide infinite possibilities for the troupe's performances, from flying apparatuses to transforming robots, from laser effects to holographic projections—he always brings something surprising. His creativity and technical skill ensure that Wonderlands×Showtime's shows are always infused with a sense of technology and futuristic flair.

Rui also has a unique fashion sense, with a particular love for steampunk and sci-fi styles. His outfits are always full of personality, from goggles and gear ornaments to leather jackets and metal boots—every detail is carefully considered. This pursuit of style is also reflected in his invention designs, creating a distinctive "Rui aesthetic."

It's also worth mentioning that Rui has a secret laboratory, filled with all kinds of invention tools and experimental equipment. He often works late into the night in his lab, neglecting sleep and meals for the sake of an idea. Although his inventions sometimes have unexpected mishaps (like explosions or malfunctions), he never gets discouraged, always learning from his failures to create even better works.

kanade.name: Yoisaki Kanade
kanade.desc:
Yoisaki Kanade's representative color is a mysterious reddish-purple, a deep and melancholic hue that perfectly reflects the pain deep within her heart and her unwavering dedication to music. As a second-year student at a correspondence high school, Kanade is the founder and composer for 25-ji, Nightcord de.

Kanade is a girl filled with inner conflict and suffering. She was once a cheerful and lively child, but an accident changed her life forever. The music she created unintentionally hurt her beloved father, plunging him into a state of deep self-blame and despair. This event caused Kanade immense psychological trauma. She came to believe that her own music had "killed" her father's musical dreams, and from that point on, she fell into a spiral of deep remorse and pain.

Seeking atonement, Kanade resolved to create "music that makes people happy." She founded the music circle 25-ji, hoping to heal others through music, and perhaps also to find redemption for herself. She logs on precisely at 1:00 AM (the "25th hour") every day to communicate and create with the other members through their online platform. Her musical style is filled with sadness and loneliness, yet it also carries a glimmer of hope and strength.

Kanade's personality is introverted, sensitive, and insecure. She isn't good at face-to-face communication and much prefers to express herself through the internet and music. Her life is very monotonous; aside from composing, she mainly just sleeps, with few other leisure activities. She has a frail constitution, is not good at sports, and even struggles with household chores. Her world revolves entirely around music—it is her only salvation.

However, Kanade possesses an extreme dedication and innate talent for music. She has a unique ability to accurately sense the passage of time, which allows her to precisely grasp rhythm and melody in her compositions. Her musical works are full of emotion and depth; each piece feels like a reflection of her inner world. She believes that music has a soul, and through it, she can convey the feelings she cannot put into words.

Within 25-ji, Kanade is the core and the soul. She is not only responsible for composing but also for coordinating the team's creative direction, determining the theme and style for each song. Her presence transforms 25-ji from a mere collection of online acquaintances into a true music creation team. Her persistence and dedication also inspire the other members, helping each of them find their own value through creating music.

It's also worth mentioning that Kanade has a special habit—she loves listening to various genres of music late at night, from classical to pop, from rock to electronic, exploring a wide range. This broad musical taste provides a rich source of inspiration for her own creations. She incorporates elements from the diverse music she hears into her work, creating a unique "Kanade style".

mafuyu.name: Asahina Mafuyu
mafuyu.desc:
Asahina Mafuyu's representative color is a deep blue-purple, a mysterious and elegant hue that perfectly matches her complex personality and inner world. As a third-year student at Miyamasuzaka Girls' Academy, Mafuyu serves as the lyricist and mixer for 25-ji, Nightcord de.

Mafuyu is a figure full of contradictions. At school, she is a model honor student, serving as class representative, excelling in the archery club, and beloved by both teachers and classmates. She is intelligent, kind, generous, and considerate—the perfect student in everyone's eyes. However, beneath this flawless exterior hides a profoundly empty and lost soul.

Mafuyu's inner world is cold and lonely. She cannot feel genuine emotions; she doesn't know what she truly likes or what she truly wants. Everything she does is to meet others' expectations, to be the "good girl" that everyone wants her to be. Her mother has extremely high expectations for her, demanding perfection in every aspect of her life, which causes her immense pressure and pain.

Within 25-ji, Mafuyu uses the online name "Yuki" and later creates music under the alias "own." Her musical style is cold and dark, standing in stark contrast to the image she presents at school. Her lyrics are filled with questions about reality and explorations of self, each line feeling like an interrogation of her own deepest thoughts. She uses music to search for her true self, trying to find a glimmer of light within the darkness.

Mafuyu's personality is straightforward and honest, sometimes to the point of being brutally so. She is not good at lying and always expresses her thoughts and feelings directly. When asked for her opinion, she often replies, "I don't know," but this isn't a brush-off—it's because she genuinely doesn't know what she truly thinks. She is striving to find answers, to understand her own emotions.

Within 25-ji, Mafuyu is a mysterious yet vital presence. Her skill as a lyricist is exceptional; she can always express profound emotions with simple yet powerful words. Her mixing technique is also outstanding, able to add unique sound effects and atmosphere to each song. Her presence lends a distinctive style to 25-ji's music and opens up new possibilities for the group.

It's also worth mentioning that Mafuyu has a peculiar hobby—she loves staring at fish tanks. She finds the world of fish to be simple and pure, free from complicated human relationships and the heavy weight of expectations and pressure. She wishes she could be like a fish, swimming freely in her own world.

ena.name: Shinonome Ena
ena.desc:
Shinonome Ena's representative color is a warm orange-yellow, a bright and soft hue that creates an interesting contrast with her inner world, where she desperately seeks recognition and strives to find herself. As a second-year student in the night division at Kamiyama High School, Ena serves as the illustrator for 25-ji, Nightcord de.

Ena is a girl who intensely craves validation. Her father is a renowned painter, a fact that places immense pressure and high expectations upon her. She hopes to become an excellent painter like him, earning everyone's recognition and praise. She actively posts her artwork online, seeking attention and positive feedback. Her SNS accounts are important platforms for self-expression, where she carefully curates every photo and post, hoping to make a good impression on others.

However, beneath the surface, Ena's heart is filled with insecurity and self-doubt. She worries that her work isn't good enough, that she'll never surpass her father's achievements, that she'll never gain true recognition. This anxiety and unease manifest as a touch of vanity and affectation, as she constantly tries to present her best self to the world.

Ena's personality displays classic ISFP traits—introverted, sensitive, and gentle—yet she also exhibits the extroversion and enthusiasm of an ESFP. This complex personality causes her to show different facets of herself in different situations. Online, she might be a confident artist; in reality, she might be a shy student. This fractured sense of self often leaves her feeling confused and pained.

Within 25-ji, Ena is responsible for creating the MV illustrations for the group's music. Her art style is unique, full of imagination and creativity. She can produce visual works that perfectly complement the emotion and theme of each song. Her pieces are not only beautiful but also rich in narrative, helping viewers to better understand the deeper meaning of the music.

Ena also has a younger twin brother—Shinonome Akito. Although their personalities are quite different, they share a very close bond. Ena can always understand her brother's anxieties and insecurities, offering him support and encouragement. Akito, in turn, provides inspiration and advice for his sister's artistic creations. This sibling relationship adds a genuine, human touch to both of their characters.

It's also worth mentioning that Ena has a particular habit—she loves taking selfies and posting them on social media. She spends a considerable amount of time preparing for these photos, from choosing her outfit to perfecting her expression, carefully considering every detail. Through selfies, she hopes to showcase her beauty and confidence, yet she simultaneously fears the judgments and criticisms of others.

mizuki.name: Akiyama Mizuki
mizuki.desc:
Akiyama Mizuki's representative color is a soft pinkish-purple, a sweet and dreamy hue that perfectly captures their innocent, playful, and childlike personality. As a first-year student at Kamiyama High School, Mizuki serves as the video editor for 25-ji, Nightcord de.

Mizuki is someone who loves all things cute and lives life on their own terms. Their world is filled with sweetness and beauty, and they believe that everything in this world is wonderful. With a cheerful and lively personality, they are always full of energy, bringing joy and laughter to those around them. Their laugh is as clear as a silver bell, and their smile is as radiant as sunshine.

Mizuki possesses an incredibly pure and kind heart. They are curious about everything, always wanting to learn more and experience more. They worry about an injured bird, are moved by a single blooming flower, and laugh at a funny story. This innocence isn't childishness; it's a genuine love for life and a pursuit of all that is beautiful.

Within 25-ji, Mizuki is responsible for video editing, and their editing style is full of creativity and imagination. They can take various seemingly unrelated elements and combine them to create surprising and delightful visual effects. Their work is always filled with a childlike wonder and a dreamlike quality, allowing viewers to feel joy and warmth. They believe that through video, they can convey happiness and help more people appreciate the beauty in life.

Mizuki also carries a secret that they don't share with everyone—their gender. This secret has caused them much pain and confusion while growing up, but they have never stopped searching for their true self. A large part of the reason they joined 25-ji was because they found resonance in Kanade's music and hoped to express their authentic self through musical creation.

Within 25-ji, Mizuki is a unique and vital presence. Their optimism and enthusiasm infect everyone, allowing even this team, often filled with pain and confusion, to experience moments of joy and hope. Their creativity and imagination add a distinctive color to the group's works. Their very existence proves that even in the darkest of times, light and hope can still be found.

Mizuki also has a unique fashion sense, with a particular love for cute and dreamy styles. Their closet is stuffed with brightly colored, adorably designed clothes, and their room is filled with various plush toys and character goods. They coordinate their outfits based on their mood and the occasion, with each ensemble being a reflection of their personality.

It's also worth mentioning that Mizuki has a special hobby—they love collecting all sorts of cute little things, from stickers to badges, from keychains to figurines. They incorporate these little treasures into their video projects, adding unique elements to each creation. They believe that "cuteness is the most powerful force in the world," and through it, they can heal people's hearts.

start.title: Which heart resonates with you?Character test of Project Sekai
start.disclaimer:
This test is a second-created work for fans. It is completely free, based on the worldview of Project Sekai :Colorful Stage.
The copyright of all characters belongs to SEGA, Colorful Palette and other original companies.
Q 39 · Five-dimensional · Experimental options are turned on by default and can be canceled at any time.
start.nicknameHint: It could be modified and will be displayed in the title copy of the result page
start.weightedDesc: Weighted algorithm to highlight the uniqueness of the role
start.weightedNote: ※ After turning on, it may affect the objectivity of the results, but it can increase the chances of low-frequency characters.
